overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire exploring the city of Alexandria at dusk. The character walks along a columned terrace with the Lighthouse of Alexandria visible in the distance, pauses at an overlook, then explores a large amphitheater.

scene_state.functional_zone: columned terrace walkway with lighthouse view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a paved terrace between large red and white columns toward the distant Lighthouse of Alexandria

entered.detail: tall cylindrical columns painted red on the lower half and white on the upper half
ancient stone building with columns and balconies featuring lit torches
tall white tower with a flame at the top visible in the distance against the night sky
light-colored stone tiles with red accent lines forming the walkway
tall dark green trees lining the path between columns

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide stone terrace flanked by massive red and white columns. The Lighthouse of Alexandria stands prominently in the distance against a deep blue evening sky, while classical buildings with burning torches line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace overlook with decorative railing

events.description: character stops at the railing to observe the view of the harbor and lighthouse
character turns around 180 degrees to walk back toward the plaza

agents.ego_description: pausing at the terrace edge to look out at the lighthouse and harbor, then turning to walk back

entered.detail: ornate stone balustrade with decorative panels overlooking the harbor
body of water visible beyond the terrace with distant city lights

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the edge of the terrace where a decorative stone railing provides a view of the harbor and the Lighthouse of Alexandria. After pausing to observe the view, the character turns around and begins walking back toward the columned plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial plaza with rows of columns and flagpoles

events.description: entering the amphitheater area from the columned plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past rows of columns and flagpoles toward the amphitheater

entered.detail: numerous tall poles with red banners lining the plaza
semicircular rows of stone tiered seating rising from the ground
large stone building with columns and pediment adjacent to the amphitheater

segments.scene_description: The character walks back through the ceremonial plaza, passing between rows of tall flagpoles and red-and-white columns. The amphitheater comes into view on the right, with its stone seating tiers rising beside a classical temple building.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient amphitheater with tiered stone seating

events.description: character begins descending the stone steps into the amphitheater
character turns to walk along the lower corridor of the amphitheater

agents.ego_description: walking down the stone steps of the amphitheater and exploring the lower walkways, passing another pedestrian

notable_agents.action: man in tunic walking up the amphitheater steps in the opposite direction

entered.detail: rows of curved stone benches rising in semicircular tiers
covered walkway at the base of the seating with decorated stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character descends into the amphitheater, walking down the stone steps between the tiered seating sections. The camera follows as the character explores the lower corridor, passing another pedestrian walking in the opposite direction, with the stone architecture of the theater surrounding the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand columned terrace overlooking the harbor into the depths of a classical amphitheater. It begins with the character walking along a wide stone path flanked by massive red and white columns, with the Lighthouse of Alexandria standing prominently against a deep blue evening sky. As the character reaches a decorative stone railing to observe the harbor view, the camera pivots to follow them as they turn back toward the ceremonial plaza. The scene then expands to reveal rows of tall flagpoles and the rising stone tiers of an amphitheater on the right before the character descends the steps into the theater's interior. Finally, the camera follows the character through a lower corridor of stone architecture, passing another pedestrian as they explore the heart of the structure.
